Source URL: https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/FAQs.asp

# Need certification help 8a WOSB HUBZone SDV route

Review date: 2026-06-28

## User intent
The user asks about small-business certifications for contracting.

## Best primary route
Route to UH APEX certification readiness and official certification pages. BOSS should not decide eligibility or guarantee approval.

## Ask first
- Which buyer are you targeting?
- Which certification are you asking about?
- Is the business legally formed and who owns/controls it?

## Recommended response pattern
1. Clarify target buyer and certification.
2. Explain certifications can help but are not always required.
3. Route to APEX and official pages.
4. Add no-guarantee guardrail.

## Example BOSS response
Certification fit depends on buyer and program. UH APEX can help you understand routes, but official programs decide eligibility.
